question: The choropleth map shows GDP (in billions) for selected US states. Which statement is correct?

options.A: Kentucky clearly has a much higher GDP than all the other highlighted states.
options.B: The extremely small text size makes it difficult to read specific GDP values accurately.
options.C: Nebraska’s GDP can be identified as exactly 3.2 on the map.
options.D: The map makes it easy to compare precise GDP values between the highlighted states.

explanation: The map uses extremely small font sizes which make it nearly impossible to read specific GDP figures accurately. Rankings and exact values cannot be verified.
